resources.string: Capture a receipt with CameraX or import an existing image, then run on-device OCR, review the parsed fields, and save the result locally.
CameraX capture, Photo Picker import, and file import all feed the same OCR and review flow.
The remaining product gaps are Compose UI tests, screenshots, and final showcase polish.
No receipt selected yet. Import a receipt image to preview the first real app flow.
Frame the receipt, capture a photo, and send it directly into the OCR draft flow.
Camera access is required to capture new receipt images on-device.
Camera permission was denied. Allow camera access to capture a receipt from this screen.
Unable to capture a receipt image from the camera.
Load a deterministic review-ready draft so screenshots can be recaptured with the same merchant, values, and OCR preview.
Imported receipt from the Android Photo Picker. The preview below confirms the capture entry path is working.
Imported receipt from the document picker. The preview below confirms file-based import is working.
Captured receipt from the on-device camera preview.
Receipt imported. Running on-device OCR now.
Receipt imported, but OCR did not complete successfully.
Receipt imported and OCR text extracted into a draft.
Scanning the imported receipt with ML Kit on-device OCR.
%1$d text lines extracted into the current draft.
OCR completed, but no readable text was extracted from the image.
Saved receipts, thumbnails, totals, and detail navigation will live here after local persistence is added.
This screen will show local receipt history with thumbnails, merchant names, dates, and totals.
The next product slice will add detail navigation, preview images, and delete actions.
Defaults for currency, image handling, and local storage behavior will be configured here once persistence exists.
Default currency and import behavior will become the first real settings values.
Later this area will explain local storage usage and image cleanup behavior.
